ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "full_time_home_goals" INTEGER /* Full-time goals scored by the home team */,
  "full_time_away_goals" INTEGER /* Full-time goals scored by the away team */,
  "full_time_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (H, A, D) */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee officiating the match */,
  "match_week" INTEGER /* Match week in which the match was played */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee_assistant1" TEXT /* Name of the first assistant referee */,
  "referee_assistant2" TEXT /* Name of the second assistant referee */,
  "fourth_official" TEXT /* Name of the fourth official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_year FOREIGN KEY ("season_year") REFERENCES match_weeks ("season_year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_match_week FOREIGN KEY ("match_week") REFERENCES match_weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee FOREIGN KEY ("referee") REFERENCES referees ("referee_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team plays */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the current manager */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "website" TEXT /* Team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the referee */,
  "career_start" INTEGER /* Year the referee started their career */,
  "career_end" INTEGER /* Year the referee ended their career (if applicable) */,
  "fifa_referee" INTEGER /* Indicates if the referee is a FIFA-licensed referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match associated with these statistics */,
  "home_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the home team */,
  "away_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the away team */,
  "home_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the home team */,
  "away_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the away team */,
  "home_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards issued to the home team */,
  "away_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards issued to the away team */,
  "home_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards issued to the home team */,
  "away_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards issued to the away team */,
  "home_possession" REAL /* Possession percentage of the home team */,
  "away_possession" REAL /* Possession percentage of the away team */,
  "home_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the home team */,
  "away_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the away team */,
  "home_offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents by the home team */,
  "away_offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents by the away team */,
  "home_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the home team */,
  "away_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* League's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odds" (
  "odds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odds record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match associated with these odds */,
  "home_win_odds" REAL /* Odds for the home team to win */,
  "draw_odds" REAL /* Odds for the match to end in a draw */,
  "away_win_odds" REAL /* Odds for the away team to win */,
  "bookmaker" TEXT /* Name of the bookmaker providing the odds */,
  "odds_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the odds were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match week */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "match_week" INTEGER /* Match week number */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the match week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the match week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match data */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with this performance */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match associated with this performance */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned in the match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Goals scored in the match */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Goals conceded in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards issued to the team */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards issued to the team */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the team */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents by the team */,
  "corners_taken" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
